subcodes.first_line: O Lord, my Supreme God! This youth is a descendant of Thy servant who hath ascended unto Thy Most Glorious Kingdom. Verily, my Lord, he [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا ربی الاعلی ان هذا الفتی سلیل عبدک المتصاعد الی ملکوتک الابهی رب انه
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world
